canonical_definition: A visualization tool used to assess model calibration by plotting the model's average prediction confidence against its actual accuracy within binned confidence intervals.
papers: Adaptive Elicitation of Latent Information Using Natural Language
Calibrated Language Models and How to Find Them with Label Smoothing
